cbt.description: A structured treatment focused on patterns of thought, emotion, and behavior.
cbt.shortSummary: Structured skills for changing unhelpful thinking and behavior.

cbt_health_tailored.description: CBT adapted for people managing depression alongside a long-term physical health condition.
cbt_health_tailored.shortSummary: CBT adapted for depression linked to ongoing physical health conditions.

behavioral_activation.description: A practical treatment focused on rebuilding routines, activity, and contact with rewarding experiences.
behavioral_activation.shortSummary: A practical approach focused on getting active again.

ipt.description: A treatment focused on relationships, role changes, conflict, grief, and loneliness.
ipt.shortSummary: A relationship-focused treatment for mood and role stress.

mindfulness_relapse_focused.description: A relapse-focused approach that helps people notice mood patterns and respond differently to them.
mindfulness_relapse_focused.shortSummary: Mindfulness-oriented support for recurrent or relapse-prone depression.

problem_solving.description: A structured treatment focused on breaking problems into manageable steps and decisions.
problem_solving.shortSummary: A practical treatment centered on structured problem-solving.

supportive_therapy.description: A lower-intensity supportive approach focused on validation, guidance, and coping.
supportive_therapy.shortSummary: Supportive care centered on coping, stabilization, and encouragement.

life_review.description: A reflective treatment often used with older adults to integrate memories, identity, and meaning.
life_review.shortSummary: A reflective therapy often used in later life.

psychodynamic.description: A treatment focused on recurring emotional patterns, relationships, and internal conflicts.
psychodynamic.shortSummary: Explores recurring emotional and relationship patterns.

act.description: A therapy that combines values-based action with acceptance and psychological flexibility skills.

other_third_wave.description: Related skills-based cognitive therapies beyond CBT and ACT.

combined_multi_component.description: Programs that combine several psychological elements rather than one single treatment model.
combined_multi_component.shortSummary: Multi-part interventions that blend several treatment components.

psychoeducational_guided_self_help.description: Lower-intensity structured materials or guided self-help based approaches.
psychoeducational_guided_self_help.shortSummary: Structured self-help or psychoeducation with guided support.

other_psychological.description: Other psychological interventions that do not fit a single main display group.
